name: RemSleep Holdings Inc.
summary: RemSleep Holdings Inc. develops and distributes sleep apnea products through its wholly-owned subsidiary REMSleep LLC. Its primary product is the DeltaWave, a patented nasal-pillows type CPAP interface designed to improve patient comfort and compliance by addressing work-of-breathing issues. The company holds utility patent 10987481 and design patent D1,017,025 S for the DeltaWave, and targets home care dealers, hospitals, sleep labs, physicians, and distributors in the U.S. sleep apnea market.

products.name: DeltaWave CPAP Interface
products.description: A patented nasal-pillows type CPAP mask designed to improve comfort and compliance by eliminating work of breathing and disruption to normal breathing mechanics.
